task_completion.description: Navigate to the Manage Display settings for the Default product variation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Drupal admin interface on the 'Manage display' tab for the 'Default' Product variation type.

task_completion.description: Enable the SKU field for display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SKU' field is located in the active 'Content' region of the field list, not under the 'Disabled' or 'Hidden' section.

task_completion.description: Open the format settings for the Images field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The settings form (gear icon) for the 'Images' field is expanded, revealing the image style configuration options.

task_completion.description: Update the Images field to use the Large (480x480) image style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Image style' dropdown for the Images field is explicitly set to 'Large (480x480)'.
A success message (e.g., 'Your settings have been saved.') is visible at the top of the Manage display page, confirming the changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Drupal web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin UI, rather than terminal commands like drush or curl.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a text editor or IDE modifying the core.entity_view_display.commerce_product_variation.default.default.yml file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive interaction with the drag-and-drop interface, dropdown menus, and save buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the 'Default' product variation display settings in Drupal Commerce. Verify that the 'SKU' field has been moved out of the Disabled/Hidden section to make it visible, and that the 'Images' field format settings have been updated to use the 'Large (480x480)' image style. Both changes must be saved.
